summary: Fixes slow Gmail login and refresh caused by sign-in redirect loops.

fixed: Gmail login no longer gets stuck in a redirect loop during Google sign-in
Returning users with saved sessions load the inbox directly instead of the sign-in page first
Sign-in URL is only used when adding a new Gmail account, with email still prefilled
Hidden mail web views stop loading in the background so the active inbox renders faster
Mail sync after sign-in is deferred so Gmail can finish rendering before background work runs
